plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow DriveMate to use your location for trip tracking and safety features.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow DriveMate to use your location even when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow DriveMate to use your location while using the app.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow DriveMate to access your microphone for voice commands.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow DriveMate to use speech recognition for voice commands.

plugins.motionPermission: Allow DriveMate to access motion sensors for activity recognition.

infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow DriveMate to use your location for trip tracking and safety features.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow DriveMate to use your location while using the app.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow DriveMate to access your microphone for voice commands.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow DriveMate to use speech recognition for voice commands.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Allow DriveMate to access motion sensors for activity recognition.
